reason_for_decision: Well framed, operationally grounded, and strong at distinguishing controlled factory proof from field proof.
strengths: Explains the acceptance-boundary difference between FAT and SAT clearly and keeps the discussion tied to security deployment realities.
Translates abstract project terms into concrete examples such as coverage, latency, geometry, and operator workflow.
Adds strong planning value by showing how acceptance criteria and configuration control should differ between stages.
summary_assessment: A solid professional article with clear structure, practical commissioning relevance, and strong guidance on how to divide proof between factory and site.
